E8 Markets 20% OFF Crypto Deal

E8 Markets is offering a 20% discount on their exclusive Static Crypto Plan using code STATIC. This deal is tailored specifically for traders who want to focus on cryptocurrency markets under a unique static drawdown structure — one of the most trader-friendly risk models in the prop trading industry. With daily payouts available, this is one of the fastest paths to consistent income through prop trading.

E8 Markets is a proprietary trading firm that has carved out a distinctive position in the market by offering a static drawdown model rather than the more common trailing drawdown. Founded with a commitment to fairness and transparency, E8 has gained a loyal following among traders who appreciate the predictability of a fixed loss limit that does not move against you as your account grows in value.

With code STATIC, you save 20% on the Static Crypto Plan — a specialized challenge designed for traders who focus on digital assets. Beyond the discount, the standout feature of this plan is daily payouts, which dramatically shortens the feedback loop between your trading performance and your actual earnings. The static drawdown model means your maximum loss threshold is set at the start and does not change, eliminating the psychological pressure of a trailing limit that tightens as you profit.

E8 Markets' trading conditions for the Static Crypto Plan include access to a range of cryptocurrency instruments, competitive profit splits, and a challenge structure with a fixed daily loss limit and overall static maximum drawdown. The firm's rules are designed to prevent over-leveraged blow-ups while still giving traders meaningful room to execute their strategies. Daily payouts are processed efficiently through verified payout channels.

To claim this deal, visit E8 Markets via the affiliate link above, navigate to the Static Crypto Plan, and enter code STATIC at checkout. Your 20% discount will be applied at the payment stage. This is a specialized plan with limited availability — check the E8 Markets site for current pricing and account tier options before purchasing.
